name: indie-founder-mcp
description: Aggregates Lemon Squeezy + Gumroad + Polar + Stripe revenue into one Claude-queryable view.
long_description: Indie Founder Revenue MCP gives Claude a single tool surface across Lemon Squeezy + Gumroad + Polar + Stripe. v0.1 ships the Lemon Squeezy adapter (live-validated against production), with the other adapters coming in v0.2. Tools: summary_mrr, top_customers, refund_signal, recent_orders, export_csv_for_tax (NBU-rate-anchored, for Ukrainian FOP 3rd-group filing), health.

tools.name: summary_mrr
tools.description: Combined MRR/ARR across every connected store.

tools.name: refund_signal
tools.description: Compares current N-day refund ratio to prior N-day window.

tools.name: recent_orders
tools.description: Last N orders across all stores.

tools.name: export_csv_for_tax
tools.description: CSV export for Ukrainian FOP 3rd-group quarterly filing.

ls_api_token.title: Lemon Squeezy API Token
ls_api_token.description: Lemon Squeezy API token (https://app.lemonsqueezy.com/settings/api). Required to enable the LS adapter.

ls_store_id.title: Lemon Squeezy Store ID (optional)
ls_store_id.description: Optional. Without it, the adapter pulls from every store on the account.
